mapper.select: SELECT id, vendor_code, vendor_name, config_json, enabled, create_time, update_time FROM tts_config ORDER BY id
SELECT id, vendor_code, vendor_name, config_json, enabled, create_time, update_time FROM tts_config WHERE enabled = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tts_config (vendor_code, vendor_name, config_json, enabled) VALUES (#{vendorCode}, #{vendorName}, #{configJson}, COALESCE(#{enabled}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE tts_config SET vendor_code = #{vendorCode}, vendor_name = #{vendorName}, config_json = #{configJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
